caption: A person with a white smartwatch and rings on their fingers is crafting on a white cutting mat. In the scene, they are working with various pieces of patterned paper, including a blue rectangular base and pieces with botanical leaf and floral prints. The person uses their left hand to hold the blue base steady while their right hand applies adhesive from a small blue applicator tool to a leaf-patterned piece of paper. As the sequence progresses, the right hand moves the applicator across the paper to distribute the glue. A black ink pad and additional floral paper scraps are visible on the workspace. In the bottom left corner of the frames, a cursive logo reads "Stamping". The actions focus on the precise application of adhesive to assemble a layered paper project.
